metadata.description: Open-source plugins, managed agents, orchestrators, and design tokens for Claude Code and any AI tool.

plugins.name: ai-news-hq
plugins.description: An AI-news team and HQ that tracks the field with web search and ships daily briefings.

plugins.name: release-radar
plugins.description: Track new AI model and tool releases, changelogs, and deprecations.

plugins.name: competitor-watch
plugins.description: Monitor competitor sites, pricing, and content via web search.

plugins.name: content-engine
plugins.description: Repurpose one piece of content across every channel.

plugins.name: brand-kit
plugins.description: Apply a OneWave design style — tokens, theme, and brand commands.
